heroImageAlt: A bright, flexible room set up for a community session
mainIntro1: Our building offers calm and accessible spaces available for hire by external organisations and individuals.
mainIntro2: Located within the beautiful rural Vale of Belvoir, our rooms are ideal for meetings, training sessions, wellbeing activities, creative groups and special appointments that benefit from privacy and tranquillity.
mainIntro3: With extensive free parking on site, tea and coffee making facilities and free Wifi access, our hospice building offers the perfect alternative to traditional corporate rooms for hire.
mainIntro4: By choosing to hire our facilities, you are also supporting the vital work of our hospice, with all income reinvested into patient care and family support.

sections.heading: Meeting & Training Space
sections.subheading: Inspiring spaces for focused thinking and collaboration
sections.body: Our hexagonal-shaped light and airy meeting room provides a refreshing alternative to traditional corporate venues. Designed to encourage calm, clarity and connection, it is perfect for:
sections.closing: Users can enjoy a quiet, confidential environment surrounded by nature, helping conversations flow and ideas flourish.

sections.heading: Extensive Tranquil Gardens
sections.subheading: A peaceful outdoor setting for reflection, creativity and connection
sections.body: Our beautifully maintained hospice gardens offer a rare sense of calm and space. The garden area is ideal for:
sections.closing: The gardens provide a serene backdrop, allowing guests to pause, breathe and reconnect in nature.

sections.heading: Hairdressing Salon
sections.body: Our on-site hairdressing salon is available for use by independent stylists and organisations seeking a peaceful, well-appointed space. It offers:

bullets.text: Easy access and a welcoming atmosphere

sections.closing: Perfect for client appointments where comfort and discretion are paramount.

sections.heading: Complementary Therapy & Beauty Suite
sections.subheading: A restorative space for wellbeing professionals
sections.body: Our complementary therapy and beauty suite provides a soothing, thoughtfully designed environment suitable for:
sections.closing: The space promotes relaxation and trust, making it ideal for practitioners who value a calm, supportive setting for their clients.

impactBody: Hiring our facilities offers more than just a space — it is a chance to make a positive impact. Every booking helps support hospice care and the families who rely on us.
galleryBody: A gallery of our facilities and gardens will be added soon.
formIntro: To make an enquiry regarding booking our facilities please complete the enquiry form.
